News Capstone » Views

Views news_app.views

HTTP view functions for the news_app application. All views are protected with @login_required and where appropriate @permission_required to enforce role-based access control.

Readerarticle_list, article_detail (approved only)
Journalistarticle_create, article_update (own), article_delete (own)
Editoreditor_article_list, approve_article, article_update, article_delete
def home(request)

Render the authenticated home page.

Parameters:request (HttpRequest) — The incoming HTTP request.
Returns:HttpResponse — Rendered home.html template.
def article_list(request)

Display a list of articles appropriate to the requesting user's role. Readers and editors see all approved articles. Journalists also see their own unapproved articles so they can track submission status. Results are ordered newest-first.

Parameters:request (HttpRequest)
Returns:HttpResponse — Rendered news_app/article_list.html with articles queryset in context.
def article_detail(request, pk)

Display a single article with access control. Readers may only view approved articles; journalists and editors may view any article.

Parameters:request (HttpRequest), pk (int) — Primary key of the Article.
Returns:HttpResponse — Rendered news_app/article_detail.html or redirect to article_list.
@login_required @permission_required("news_app.add_article")   def article_create(request)

Handle creation of a new article by a journalist. The new article is saved in an unapproved state pending editor review.

Parameters:request (HttpRequest) — POST body must contain title and content.
Returns:HttpResponse — Renders article_form.html on GET; redirects to article_list on valid POST.
@login_required @permission_required("news_app.change_article")   def article_update(request, pk)

Allow permitted users to update an existing article. Journalists may only edit their own articles. Editing an approved article resets approval so it must be re-reviewed.

@login_required @permission_required("news_app.delete_article")   def article_delete(request, pk)

Allow permitted users to delete an article. Journalists may only delete their own articles. GET shows confirmation page; POST performs deletion.

@login_required @permission_required("news_app.change_article")   def editor_article_list(request)

Show all unapproved articles to editors for review. Non-editors are redirected to the home page.

@login_required @permission_required("news_app.change_article")   def approve_article(request, pk)

Allow an editor to approve a pending article. On approval: sets is_approved=True, records approved_by and approved_at, sends email notifications via send_article_email_to_subscribers(), and posts to X via post_article_to_x().

def register_view(request)

Handle new user registration. Not protected by @login_required so unauthenticated visitors can create an account. On successful registration the user is immediately logged in.

Built with Sphinx 8.1.3 using the Read the Docs theme. News Capstone 1.0.0.
